name: Register
description: Customer wants to register for a MyVM online account, link their Virgin Media account to an online profile, or is experiencing problems with the registration or account-linking process. This is about creating or setting up online access for the first time, not logging into an existing account or resetting a password.

sampleUtterances.utterance: I want to register for a MyVM account
How do I {registrationIssue} for my Virgin Media online account?
I need to {registrationIssue} so I can manage my services online
I'm trying to register on the Virgin Media app but it's not working
Can you help me {registrationIssue} for my online account?
I can't register — it keeps saying my details aren't recognised
I want to set up an online account to view my bills and manage my services
How do I {registrationIssue} my Virgin Media account to the app?
I've been trying to register but I keep getting an error message
The {registrationIssue} I was sent isn't working
I'm a new customer and need to {registrationIssue} to manage my account
My account isn't being found when I try to register with my details
I need help linking my Virgin Media account to my Virgin ID
I've tried to register multiple times but it won't go through
Where do I go to register for an online account?
The registration page keeps showing an error
I just got Virgin Media and want to set up my online account
It says my account can't be found when I try to {registrationIssue}
I've completed registration but I can't see my services in the app
How do I create a login for my Virgin Media account?
I need to {registrationIssue} my broadband account to MyVM
register for my account
